salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Name, Quarter__c, Target_FTE__c, Approved_FTE_Coverage__c, Gap_To_Target__c, Production_Context__c, Plant__r.Name, Plant__r.Plant_Code__c, Plant__r.Id, Plant_Shop__r.Name, Plant_Shop__r.Shop_Type__c, Plant_Shop__r.Id FROM GWB_HQ_Target__c WHERE Id = ':targetId' LIMIT 1

SELECT Id, Name, Auth_Positions__c, Current_Headcount__c, Shift_Pattern__c, Station__c, Active__c FROM GWB_Plant_Function__c WHERE Plant_Shop__c = ':shopId' AND Active__c = true ORDER BY Name ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT Signal_Type__c FROM GWB_Edge_Signal__c WHERE Plant_Function__r.Plant_Shop__r.Plant__r.Plant_Code__c = ':plantCode' ORDER BY CreatedDate DESC LIMIT 1

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output application/java var t = vars.hqTarget var fn = vars.plantFunction var sig = vars.recentSignal
--- { targetId: vars.targetId, plantName: t.'Plant__r.Name' default "", plantCode: t.'Plant__r.Plant_Code__c' default vars.plantCode, plantId: t.'Plant__r.Id' default null, shopName: t.'Plant_Shop__r.Name' default vars.shopName, shopType: t.'Plant_Shop__r.Shop_Type__c' default "", shopId: t.'Plant_Shop__r.Id' default null, quarter: t.Quarter__c default vars.quarter, targetFTE: t.Target_FTE__c default 0, approvedFTE: t.Approved_FTE_Coverage__c default 0, gapToTarget: t.Gap_To_Target__c default (t.Target_FTE__c default 0), productionContext: t.Production_Context__c default "", plantFunctionId: fn.Id default null, functionName: fn.Name default "", authPositions: fn.Auth_Positions__c default 0, currentHeadcount: fn.Current_Headcount__c default 0, recentSignalType: sig.Signal_Type__c default "Bin-Depletion" }

logger.message: #['[PlantIQ] Step 1 — Plant: ' ++ payload.plantCode ++ ' | Shop: ' ++ payload.shopName ++ ' | Gap: ' ++ (payload.gapToTarget as String) ++ ' FTE | Signal: ' ++ payload.recentSignalType]

salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Name, Idea_Category__c, Applicable_Signal_Types__c, Typical_FTE_Min__c, Typical_FTE_Max__c, Typical_Effort__c, Requires_Safety_Review__c, Requires_Quality_Review__c, Requires_Finance_Approval__c, Description__c, Preconditions__c FROM GWB_Idea_Library__c WHERE Applicable_Signal_Types__c INCLUDES (':signalType') ORDER BY Typical_FTE_Max__c DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10

SELECT Id, Name, Idea_Category__c, Applicable_Signal_Types__c, Typical_FTE_Min__c, Typical_FTE_Max__c, Typical_Effort__c, Requires_Safety_Review__c, Requires_Quality_Review__c, Requires_Finance_Approval__c, Description__c, Preconditions__c FROM GWB_Idea_Library__c ORDER BY Typical_FTE_Max__c DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10

logger.message: #['[PlantIQ] Step 2 — No ideas for signal type ' ++ vars.signalType ++ ', using all ideas as fallback']
#['[PlantIQ] Step 2 — Matched ' ++ (sizeOf(payload) as String) ++ ' ideas for signal: ' ++ vars.signalType]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java var ids = vars.matchedIdeas map $.Id --- if (sizeOf(ids) == 0) null else "SELECT Id, Idea_Library__c, Shop_Type__c, Achieved_FTE__c, Quarter__c, Production_Context__c, Notes__c, Plant__r.Plant_Code__c, Plant__r.Name FROM GWB_Plant_Benchmark__c WHERE Idea_Library__c IN ('" ++ (ids joinBy "','") ++ "')"

%dw 2.0 output application/java
var ideas = vars.matchedIdeas var benchmarks = vars.benchmarks var ctx = vars.plantContext
fun benchmarksForIdea(ideaId: String) = benchmarks filter ($.Idea_Library__c == ideaId)
fun constraintWeight(idea) = 1 + (if (idea.Requires_Safety_Review__c default false) 1 else 0) + (if (idea.Requires_Quality_Review__c default false) 1 else 0) + (if (idea.Requires_Finance_Approval__c default false) 1 else 0)
fun avgFTE(bs: Array) = if (sizeOf(bs) == 0) 0 else (bs reduce ((b, acc = 0.0) -> acc + (b.Achieved_FTE__c default 0.0))) / sizeOf(bs)
fun evidenceText(bs: Array) = if (sizeOf(bs) == 0) "No cross-plant benchmarks available" else (bs map ("Plant " ++ ($.'Plant__r.Plant_Code__c' default "?") ++ " achieved " ++ (($.Achieved_FTE__c default 0) as String) ++ " FTE in " ++ ($.Quarter__c default "?"))) joinBy "; " --- (ideas map (idea) -> do { var bs = benchmarksForIdea(idea.Id) var score = (sizeOf(bs) * avgFTE(bs)) / constraintWeight(idea) --- { ideaId: idea.Id, ideaName: idea.Name, ideaCategory: idea.Idea_Category__c default "", typicalFTEMin: idea.Typical_FTE_Min__c default 0, typicalFTEMax: idea.Typical_FTE_Max__c default 0, effort: idea.Typical_Effort__c default "Medium", score: score, benchmarkCount: sizeOf(bs), benchmarkEvidence: evidenceText(bs) } }) orderBy (item) -> -(item.score)

logger.message: #['[PlantIQ] Step 3 — Top idea: ' ++ (payload[0].ideaName default 'none') ++ ' | Score: ' ++ ((payload[0].score default 0) as String) ++ ' | Benchmarks: ' ++ ((payload[0].benchmarkCount default 0) as String)]

#['[PlantIQ] Step 4 — Recommendation: ' ++ payload.selectedIdeaName ++ ' | FTE: ' ++ (payload.fteImpact as String) ++ ' | USD: ' ++ (payload.dollarImpact as String) ++ ' | Confidence: ' ++ (payload.confidenceScore as String) ++ '%']

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/java var ctx = vars.plantContext var rec = vars.recommendation var top = vars.scoredIdeas[0] default {} var effortVal = if (['Low', 'Medium', 'High'] contains (rec.effort default "")) rec.effort else if (['Low', 'Medium', 'High'] contains (top.effort default "")) top.effort else "Medium" --- [{ Name: (ctx.plantCode ++ " " ++ ctx.shopName ++ ": " ++ rec.selectedIdeaName)[0 to 79], Plant_Function__c: ctx.plantFunctionId, Idea_Library__c: top.ideaId default null, Idea_Type__c: "Permanent", Status__c: "Pending Approval", FTE_Impact__c: rec.fteImpact, Dollar_Impact__c: rec.dollarImpact, Confidence_Score__c: rec.confidenceScore, Effort__c: effortVal, AI_Generated__c: true, Assumptions__c: rec.reasoning, Benchmark_Evidence__c: (top.benchmarkEvidence default "")[0 to 255], Required_Validations__c: rec.requiredValidations }]
